mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_BASKET WHERE member_key = #{member_key}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(basket_idx), 0) + 1 FROM BOOK_BASKET
INSERT INTO BOOK_BASKET ( basket_idx, homepage_id, member_key, title, lib_name, call_no, author, loca, ctrl_no, image_url, add_date, item_type, publer ) VALUES ( #{basket_idx}, #{homepage_id}, #{member_key}, #{title}, #{lib_name}, #{call_no}, #{author}, #{loca}, #{ctrl_no}, #{image_url}, SYSDATE, #{item_type}, #{publer} )
